Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
11.8.22 ONEIROS, GOD OF PEACE
The God
Oneiros
was slain in battle in 613 AF by Bal'met, the Worldreaver.
Created by the
Logos
185 years after the Fall of the
Selucarian
empire, the God
of Peace long stood as a
reminder
of the more peaceful way of life in
Achaea
.
Renowned for His patience and understanding, Oneiros challenged violence in the
land by accepting followers into His order
who
abhorred violence of any form.
Only those pure of
spirit
and truly repentant of previous violent acts were
granted access to his
Divine
Order. His symbol was a white feather.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
